home.title: hook.press
home.subtitle: Music creation, distribution, and community
home.heroSubtitle: hook.press brings together IT studio, release office, services marketplace and community — all in one place for artists and producers.
home.featuresSubtitle: From the first lyric line to release and promotion — a modular platform with one account.

studio.title: IT Studio
studio.description: Lyrics, syllables, rhymes, AI assistant and audio analysis with LibROSA scoring.

office.title: Release office
office.description: Manage tracks, releases, ISRC/UPC and prepare for distribution.

market.title: Market
market.description: Kworks from beatmakers, designers and engineers with escrow payments.

feed.title: Feed
feed.description: Industry news, articles and insights for artists and teams.

chat.title: Chat
chat.description: Real-time messaging with collaborators, clients and community.

promo.title: Promo
promo.description: Internal ad campaigns without stream manipulation.

home.howSubtitle: Four steps from idea to release

step1.title: Create a project
step1.description: Open the studio, write lyrics with AI help and upload a demo.

step2.title: Build a release
step2.description: Add tracks in the office, fill metadata and prepare the release.

step3.title: Hire your team
step3.description: Order artwork, mixing or beats on the market with secure escrow.

step4.title: Promote
step4.description: Launch campaigns, publish to the feed and engage your audience.

forArtists.title: Focus on creativity
forArtists.point1: AI lyric editor with syllable and rhyme analysis
forArtists.point2: Single dashboard for releases and metadata
forArtists.point3: Charts and feed to track trends

forProducers.title: Monetize your skills
forProducers.point1: Sell services on the market with escrow
forProducers.point2: Chat and notifications for client work
forProducers.point3: Promo campaigns to showcase your portfolio

home.ctaSubtitle: Sign in with a dev account or create a studio project in minutes.

footer.tagline: Platform for creating, releasing and promoting music. Studio, office, market and community — in one product.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in to your hook.press account
login.devHint: Dev login — any seeded email (artist@example.com, admin@example.com)

studio.title: IT Studio
studio.subtitle: Lyrics, analysis, AI demo and send to office
studio.emptyDescription: Set theme, mood and genre — then generate your first demo track.
studio.analysisHint: Run syllable or rhyme analysis to see the rhyme map here.
studio.toOfficeConfirm: Send this project to the release office?

office.title: Release office
office.subtitle: Metadata, tracklist, scoring and distribution
office.emptyDescription: Send a finished demo from IT Studio to start building a release.
office.scoringEmpty: Scoring will appear after validation completes.
office.scoringDisclaimer: Advisory only — not a guarantee of chart placement.
office.distributionEmpty: Distribution attempts will appear after release delivery.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your studio progress, releases and activity
dashboard.noStudio: No studio projects — create one to start.
dashboard.noOffice: No office projects — send from studio.
dashboard.emptyDescription: Create your first studio project to see progress on this dashboard.

profile.title: Profile & settings
profile.subtitle: Account, roles, sessions and login history

market.title: Market
market.noLedgerHint: Payments and payouts will appear here.

market.noEvidenceHint: Add notes or files to support your case.

feed.subtitle: News, articles and insights from the music industry
